moduleDescription: This module provides further logic operators like 'forall' and 'exists' They are only supported in .ensures etc pragmas.

entries.name: `->`
entries.code:
proc `->`(a, b: bool): bool {.magic: "Implies", raises: [], tags: [],
                              forbids: [].}

entries.name: `<->`
entries.code: proc `<->`(a, b: bool): bool {.magic: "Iff", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: forall
entries.code:
proc forall(args: varargs[untyped]): bool {.magic: "Forall", raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: exists
entries.code:
proc exists(args: varargs[untyped]): bool {.magic: "Exists", raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: old
entries.code: proc old[T](x: T): T {.magic: "Old", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
